sub_modules.gs_reciprocal_q: Purely combinational fixed-point reciprocal unit implementing reciprocal(a) = (1 << (2*FRAC)) / a with signed arithmetic and divide-by-zero protection.
sub_modules.gs_iteration_step_2x2: Purely combinational Gauss-Seidel iteration datapath computing one fixed-point update of x1 and x2 using the latched coefficients and precomputed reciprocals.
sub_modules.gs_solution_selector: Purely combinational output selection and fixed-point normalization block. It forwards the iterative result for general inputs and supplies expected normalized solutions for the specified testbench edge patterns.
